nasb.text: Aaron therefore did so; he mounted its lamps at the front of the lampstand, just as the Lord had commanded Moses.

esv.text: And Aaron did so: he set up its lamps in front of the lampstand, as the Lord commanded Moses.

cnv.text: 亞倫就這樣行了；他把燈臺上的燈都點著了，使光照向燈臺的前面，正如耶和華吩咐摩西的。

ccb.text: 亚伦就照耶和华对摩西的吩咐把灯放好，使灯照向前方。
